flashcardReading.description: Flashcard-style reading tool with category filtering
flashcardReading.title: Title
flashcardReading.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this card?
flashcardReading.helpOverviewDesc: Flashcard-style reading tool with category management, pronunciation, and practice statistics.
flashcardReading.helpAddCard: Add Card: Click the + button in the top right corner, enter title, content, and category
flashcardReading.helpEditCard: Edit Card: Click the edit button on the card
flashcardReading.helpDeleteCard: Delete Card: Click the delete button on the card
flashcardReading.helpCardCategory: Category Management: Support for preset and custom categories
flashcardReading.helpListView: List View: Display all cards in a two-column grid with pagination
flashcardReading.helpStatisticsView: Statistics View: Display practice data and rankings
flashcardReading.helpPronunciation: Pronunciation: Click play button to use Web Speech API for pronunciation
flashcardReading.helpAutoPlay: Auto-play: Automatically plays pronunciation when switching cards in single card mode
flashcardReading.helpPracticeCount: Practice Statistics: Automatically record practice count after each play
flashcardReading.helpCategoryFilter: Category Filter: Select specific category from dropdown
flashcardReading.helpSearchKeyword: Keyword Search: Search titles and content
